commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a backend-delegated user-only transcript warning to `/export-session` replies, the exported HTML session payload, the export HTML template/CSS, and command-level regression tests.

PR surface: Source +33, Tests +58. Total +91 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: feed current main a transcript whose message entries are all `role: user`, and `/export-session` exports that data without a backend-delegated warning while the template computes empty assistant/tool/usage stats. I did not run a live CLI/ACP backend reproduction in this read-only review.
